A

Audio - Class in engine.audio
EXPERIMENTAL AUDIO ENGINE

clear() - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame

D

draw() - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
drawCircle(int, boolean) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
Draws a circle centered at the current turtle position.
drawRect(int, int, boolean) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
Draws a rectangle centered at the current turtle position.
drawSquare(int, boolean) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
drawText(String, double, double) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
Draws text at the specified coordinates (relative to center).

engine.annot - package engine.annot

engine.input - package engine.input

F

fill() - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 

G

Game - Annotation Interface in engine.annot
Annotation to mark a class as a game implementation.
getMouseX() - Method in class engine.input.Input
Gets the current x-coordinate of the mouse.
getMouseY() - Method in class engine.input.Input
Gets the current y-coordinate of the mouse.

I

Init - Class in engine.loader
 
Init() - Constructor for class engine.loader.Init
 
input(Input) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
Input - Class in engine.input
Manages keyboard and mouse input state for the game.
Input() - Constructor for class engine.input.Input
Creates a new Input instance.
isDown() - Method in class engine.input.Input
Checks if the down arrow or 'S' key is pressed.
isKey(int) - Method in class engine.input.Input
Checks if a specific key is currently pressed.
isLeft() - Method in class engine.input.Input
Checks if the left arrow or 'A' key is pressed.
isRight() - Method in class engine.input.Input
Checks if the right arrow or 'D' key is pressed.
isSpace() - Method in class engine.input.Input
Checks if the space bar is pressed.
isUp() - Method in class engine.input.Input
Checks if the up arrow or 'W' key is pressed.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class engine.loader.Init
 
move(double, double) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
moveTo(double, double) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 

N

name() - Element in annotation interface engine.annot.Game
The name of the game.

P

pen - Variable in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
penDown() - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
penUp() - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
playMusic(String, float) - Static method in class engine.audio.Audio
Plays a file on loop.
playSound(String) - Static method in class engine.audio.Audio
Plays a short sound effect once.

S

setFontSize(int) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
Changes the font size for drawText.
setKey(int, boolean) - Method in class engine.input.Input
Sets the state of a key.
setMouse(int, int) - Method in class engine.input.Input
Sets the current mouse position.
setThickness(float) - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
Changes line thickness (useful for "Neon" effects).
start() - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
startEngine() - Method in class engine.core.CoreGame
 
stopMusic() - Static method in class engine.audio.Audio
Stops the currently playing background music track.
